profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Haloni Jane Tbk manufactures and sells disposable gloves in Indonesia. The company trades in laboratory equipment, pharmaceutical equipment, and medical equipment for humans. It provides its products to healthcare, hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, dental practices and laboratories, personal care sector, beauty salons, food processing businesses, and industrial users. The company also exports its products. PT Haloni Jane Tbk was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
